authorized_by: coordinator-relayed cross-model pre-run RE-REVIEW HOLD (2026-07-16) on glm-s4drop-0 R2: items 1/4 (estimand relabel, layer/pin fixes) CONFIRMED sound; items 2/3/5 (io-digest gate, spurious-verdict residuals, power/budget residuals) directed to fix + reset-refreeze in the lawful pre-final window; bead kernel-of-truth-hryb; maintainer approved (issue #43; $40 non-AWS in-kind); precedent registry/corrections/glm-s4drop-0/1-prefreeze-correction.json (seq 1, same window)
changes: ITEM 2 (io-digest): kot-s4row/2 replay rows gain a MANDATORY per-prompt traj_sha256 (64-hex trajectory digest over the exact forced token-id sequence); io_match now GATES on digest IDENTITY against the pinned s4-b0 reference digests (meta.replay_reference.digests, ASM-2401) - equal token COUNTS on a divergent trajectory VOID io_match; a missing/placeholder reference digest map fails closed; projected io-match no longer TRUSTS the supplied match_rel_err - it is RECOMPUTED from the removed_frac/removed-byte audit fields with a 0.005 supplied-vs-recomputed coherence audit (MATCH_AUDIT_COH); the common-token match gate is <= 5% of the dose (REAL_DOSE_TOL 0.05, was 0.25).

ITEM 3 (spurious-verdict residuals): n_target_toks is REQUIRED and VALIDATED at ingestion on every quality item row (absent/non-positive/non-integer => ERR_S4A_ITEM, ASM-2402); quality liveness gains a registered MEANINGFUL variance floor LIVENESS_MIN_STDEV = 1e-3 nats/tok on each primary arm AND the primary deltas (plus n_distinct >= 50, zero-delta fraction <= 0.10) - a mathematically-positive 1e-12 jitter readout is now INSTRUMENT-INVALID (liveness void), never a KILL.

ITEM 5 (power/budget residuals, ASM-2403): (a) the [2%,8%) dose band binds in FINAL mode too - a final stream whose projected dose lies in the band is REFUSED fail-closed (ERR_S4A_DOSE_BAND); realized/projected coherence enforced at lawful projections (realized > projected x 1.15 or realized < 2% => ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT, never graded); (b) cost_ledger_valid requires the REGISTERED phase-boundary checkpoint sequence (FINAL: telemetry, masks, bring-up, quality-<arm> x8 in arm order, t-eval, replay; CONSTRUCTION: telemetry, masks) - distinct labels, registered order, absence lawful only for a lawfully ladder-dropped arm; duplicate/placeholder checkpoint trails rejected; (c) ASM-2389 (stale iid MDE ~0.043 / power ~0.89) formally SUPERSEDED by ASM-2399 in the central register; (d) TOST/KILL prose corrected in the frozen kill text: TOST is dose-independent while kill trigger 1 carries the 8% realized-dose floor, so a TOST pass coincides with the kill ONLY at lever-scale realized dose - at sub-floor dose TOST is reported alongside INCONCLUSIVE (selftest branch tost-lowdose).

KILL trigger 1 carries the SAME realized-dose floor as PASS (replay dose >= 8%, skeptic-5 R2 finding 1, ASM-2399 revised): a quality tie at sub-floor dose is INCONCLUSIVE, never a kill; full-verdict power ledger discloses P(io_match) ~ 0.975 under STIPULATED rho 0.9 with the rho 0.5 sensitivity (skeptic-5 R2 finding 2).
